sourceTitle: Syrian Arab Republic (country code +963), National Numbering Plan
license: ITU website terms; public informational material with reuse limitations

rawFiles.name: T02020000C90004PDFE.pdf
rawFiles.notes: Public ITU-hosted numbering-plan PDF. The repository stores extracted factual metadata, not a mirrored copy of the source PDF.

transforms: Normalize displayed prefixes such as (0)11 into national dialingPrefix values such as 011.
Store fixed area codes without the trunk prefix in areaCode and with the trunk prefix in dialingPrefix.
Map operator names to stable OpenSyria IDs.
Represent reserved, used, unused, short-number, and private-numbering facts as number-range records.
Link fixed area-code geography to OpenSyria governorate IDs where available.
reviewNotes: Imported factual numbering metadata only. ITU terms remain visible in sources.json; do not mirror source files or imply broader redistribution rights beyond the extracted factual dataset.
